- [Stats and Realm Mechanics](<https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pnheXD_pkjz8YGmWWlQPnw4eXr6NRm-W6267c0K1_QU/edit?slide=id.p1#slide=id.p1>), by Mythag University

- [Damage Formula](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652>), by Jynn
- [Morimens Glossary](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417237861412896859>), by Mythag University
- [Morimens Timeline Megasheet](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BCfu0RdP6A4SIE0XmoevGFTKp5qbilfiTViGwprpHv4/edit?usp=sharing>), by nikolazuli

tldr:

1: Crit DMG/Chance, Silver Key/Aliemus Recharge
2: Crit DMG/Chance, Realm Mastery, Black Sigil Drop
3: Crit DMG/Chance, ATK Potency, Death Res
4: Silver Key/Aliemus Recharge, Realm Mastery, Black Sigil Drop
5: ATK Potency, Silver Key/Aliemus Recharge, Death Res
6: ATK Potency, Realm Mastery, Death Res, Black Sigil Drop
there are 6 pieces numbered.
atk potency and silver key are synonymous with dmg amp and keyflare regen respectively
these are the possible main stats you can get for each piece
oh okay
is that unanimous on all the covs?
for life drain, try to get keyflare, dmg amp, and your second piece can be sigil drop
yup.  but you want different main stat on different covs
makes sense
for your substat, you want to roll until you get a max stat on keyflare, dmg amp, or death resistance
and then lock it
try to get 2 maxed out substat on each cov and then work on a different cov set

yeah this should be your number 1 priority right now
fair warning: dont expect to get a 100% maxed out cov

Does tawil and kaith pair well together
Mono Chaos gains 250 keyflare every turn, second posse in same turn lets you select any posse and double cast it once per exploration, and you get aliemus based on realm mastery every time you posse.
Completely different playstyle from pure Ultra as Tea said
Both function as primary DPS and want most of your arithmetica thrown at them when possible. They're *fine* together but not particularly synergistic imo

with that said, Tawil did recently get the ability to buff other chars with 25% final dmg, shield, healing when playing their card so there is that lol

What exactly does this do?

It lets you reset a standard character completely and gives you the same number of standard selectors. So if you really don't like pandia and you have her e3, if you use that on pandia you would get 4 standard selectors to use on a character you like.

Hi, I apologize if this has been covered somewhere already, but how does the drop rate differ from the comprehensive drop rate? In addition, the non Kath awakener drop chance is listed as 2.6, and kath’s is 2.38, but it says the chance the ssr you pull is kath is 33%?
I have E3 GMurphy and 0E Goliath. I currently have 4 of the dupe stuff. How many dupes does Tulu need? I'm currently using Faros. Still debating whether to pull on the Aqueor banner cuz it's so RNG.
any recs for who to use this on
Where is this?
Oh just chapter 4
"comprehensive drop rate" means the total overall average rate, with all pities and guarantees factored in
you have a 3.03% base chance of SSR per pull, but SSR pity is at 30 pulls, so the overall average rate over many pulls is 1 SSR per 20 pulls, or 5%
i see i see

similarly, you have a 33% chance per SSR of it being kath, with a guarantee after two fails, so averaged out overall that comes to one kath per 42.22 pulls on average or 2.37% (probably listed as 2.38% because of rounding)
that makes a lot of sense, tysm
